textByHash.8d82e160f53ab3903bef378b5e08ca7ba5c9da57: Who goes there? This is no place for a human. You need to leave.
textByHash.5c4f6fab06fcb52e01e350a14691b84d54b45697: I am no man! They changed me and cursed me to remain here...
textByHash.dbafb278fae0c670e45d9d7bfa7b51421039dfd8: I was once a free man, powerful and wealthy. I owned several apothecaries across Kourend and sold the tastiest potions in the land.
textByHash.82545583cde065926f53b6e6699b08670b19cea1: One of my greatest inventions, it was going so well. I spent days finding the right herbs, I travelled across all of Kourend to find the most exotic weeds. Once I had gathered them all, I put them in a potion and mixed in
textByHash.9bea99d076d72baf2d68fa7e974579e5d786a6e8: Yes, yes... The potion tasted delicious but it was missing a tiny something so I added Magic roots to the potion. It started to pulsate and glow! I took a sip and I felt like a million gold! A few seconds later my eye sight
textByHash.f604683294974b508c5a89aebac534c721c154ab: began to blur, my brain was throbbing. I fell and hit my head on my worktop, then it all went black.
textByHash.52d7edff0ac31703995207148c4746b66ed24e1e: I woke up screaming in pain. Blue foam streaming out of my mouth, my eye sight worse than before, the only things I could make out were 3 tall figures with green banners - they were of the Arceuus Elders. They
textByHash.30d286bbd12387df642a0a5a475f20c2cb333b7c: muttered to each other in Archaic Language after trying to get up several times. I lost hope and stared at the sky. I had given up when the tallest of the figures bent over and brought his face right to mine and spoke
textByHash.1719eebd08e68662bf710e210bfe7cf1df845286: very softly 'We can save you, but it will come at a cost'.
textByHash.9e1c9dd6471fd18e5fbf666733ea200224157b7d: Yes of course they saved me but look at the cost! I have horns coming out of my head and I'm still blind and stuck here... forever alone.
textByHash.3285573892b83f7945942d1415986a955a4054ed: I have been charged to stay here to prevent the Monstrosity from escaping. Those gates and the winches that operate them are the only thing that stops it breaking free.
textByHash.df6f0ebb0723d771d5ebf7b99d9961ae836723d0: You really do not want to know. Leave this place human.
textByHash.9acb38e89ab399a39e7afc0792b42dbc96a28b83: Me. And of course your quick demise at the mercy of Cerberus, guardian of the river of souls.
textByHash.2e6c90afcecc705d9241a7595a9065f777bcfe78: You are obviously passionate at trying. But only those with great skill at slaying these types of beast may enter.
textByHash.80d27ce69c0383b610d3a99cd58e3520ba0d665f: THE VOICES! AAAHHHHH! Leave this place human!
textByHash.1fb69a2e982fb216e88ff29da415c7b43cc0c28b: Then you may pass... may your soul not end up consumed and forever condemned to the-
textByHash.0f6fe1aae6670ba31445a73191c1154c870d48f7: The soul bearer! You have the soul bearer! The voices speak of it often. It is from this place, yet it is not of this place.
textByHash.7f716422a6c35f3d0496b59338fcdb606490d5b7: The voices tell me I can. They speak to me!
textByHash.ddc57730c2f3aeedd9df454ac56b1d754610f18b: The voices say you must use it wisely.
